tasks.subject: Task 0: color.ts — 색 변환
tasks.description:
RGB↔CIE xy + per-light gamut 삼각형 클램프 + mirek↔kelvin 순수 변환. TDD.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/hue/color.ts", "app/tests/unit/hue/color.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/hue/color.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["rgbToXy red region", "clampToGamut pulls in + null passthrough", "mirek<->kelvin clamp 153..500", "xyToRgb 3 int channels"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: hueTypes + hueNoteParse
tasks.description:
CLIP v2 타입 + 조명:: 노트 파싱(kind/uuid) + PMNode tomboyInternalLink 멤버십 추출. hueTypes imports color XY/Gamut. TDD.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/hue/hueTypes.ts", "app/src/lib/hue/hueNoteParse.ts", "app/tests/unit/hue/hueNoteParse.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/hue/hueNoteParse.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["parseHueNote bulb/zone/zone-null/master/none/unknown", "extractMembershipTitles reads marks in order deduped"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: bridge hue.ts — discover/pair/clip
tasks.description:
브릿지 /hue/{discover,pair,clip} CLIP v2 릴레이(node:https insecure agent), path 화이트리스트, 주입 hueRequest. server.ts 등록. TDD node:test.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["bridge/src/hue.ts", "bridge/src/hue.test.ts", "bridge/src/server.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd bridge && node --import tsx --test src/hue.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["401 no token", "clip non-whitelisted path 400", "pair 101->409 + success appkey/clientkey", "clip pipes status+body"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: hueSettings + hueClient
tasks.description:
appSettings ip/appkey/clientkey + 앱→브릿지 /hue/* 클라(전역 터미널 브릿지 재사용) + getHueContext/hueCall. TDD fetch mock.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/storage/hueSettings.ts", "app/src/lib/hue/hueClient.ts", "app/tests/unit/hue/hueClient.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/hue/hueClient.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["hueClip bearer+body status+data", "huePair 409->link_button", "hueDiscover bridges", "getHueContext null when unset"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: noteTypes 등재 + hueImport
tasks.description:
registry 조명:: (hue-master) + planLightImports 멱등 플래너. TDD.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/noteTypes/registry.ts", "app/src/lib/hue/hueImport.ts", "app/tests/unit/hue/hueImport.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/hue/hueImport.test.ts && npx vitest run tests/unit/noteTypes", "acceptanceCriteria": ["composeTitle 조명::전체", "planLightImports skips existing", "idempotent", "name fallback 전구 <id>"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: hueNotePlugin + BulbControl
tasks.description:
조명:: 게이트 에디터 플러그인(위젯 데코 + Svelte mount/unmount) + BulbControl(마운트 fetch+⟳, 옵티미스틱 쓰기) + Zone/Master 스텁 + TomboyEditor 등록. buildHueDecorations 유닛 + npm run check.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/hueNote/hueNotePlugin.ts", "app/src/lib/editor/hueNote/BulbControl.svelte", "app/src/lib/editor/hueNote/ZoneControl.svelte", "app/src/lib/editor/hueNote/MasterDashboard.svelte", "app/src/lib/editor/TomboyEditor.svelte", "app/tests/unit/hue/hueNotePlugin.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/hue/hueNotePlugin.test.ts && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["one widget bulb / none non-hue", "decoration key changes on sig change", "capability-gated controls", "npm run check"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: ZoneControl + zoneOps
tasks.description:
존 위젯 — grouped_light 바 + 양방향 멤버십(POST/PUT zone + write-back) + 씬 recall. zoneOps + noteBody. TDD + npm run check.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/hueNote/ZoneControl.svelte", "app/src/lib/hue/zoneOps.ts", "app/src/lib/hue/noteBody.ts", "app/tests/unit/hue/zoneOps.test.ts", "app/tests/unit/hue/noteBody.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/hue/zoneOps.test.ts tests/unit/hue/noteBody.test.ts && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["resolveMembershipIds resolve+unresolved", "groupedLightIdOf rid/null", "firstBodyLineOf second line", "manual group/push/scene"]}
```

